mechanism: The RFS (~36% of corn to ethanol) creates a politically embedded demand floor because farm-state senators control marginal debt ceiling votes. SNAP/farm bill (~$120B/year) adds to the fiscal consolidation trap. Together they make spending cuts in agriculture politically infeasible.
regime_dependence: Always operative but becomes binding during fiscal consolidation attempts. Political economy mechanism is precise: farm-state senators as veto players on debt ceiling.
